heading: Omitted
label: 1431 to 1435 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 1431 to 1435, relating to the sale of public lands subject to unintentional trespass, were omitted pursuant to , which provided for an expiration date three years after , with certain exceptions.section 1435 of this titleSeptember 26, 1968Section 1431, , , , authorized Secretary of the Interior to sell at public auction any tract of public domain not exceeding a certain size which was subject to unintentional trespass.Pub. L. 90–516, § 182 Stat. 870Sept. 26, 1968Section 1432, , , , related to preference rights of contiguous landowners.Pub. L. 90–516, § 282 Stat. 870Sept. 26, 1968Section 1433, , , , related to continuing liability for unauthorized prior use.Pub. L. 90–516, § 382 Stat. 870Sept. 26, 1968Section 1434, , , , related to acreage limitations.Pub. L. 90–516, § 482 Stat. 870Sept. 26, 1968Section 1435, , , , provided that authority granted by this subchapter expire three years from , except that sales for which application had been made in accordance with this subchapter prior to expiration of that period could be consummated and patents issued after expiration of that period.Pub. L. 90–516, § 582 Stat. 870Sept. 26, 1968Sept. 26, 1968
